scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/core typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/sdk typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/worker typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/rendering typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/cli typecheck
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/core test && bun run --cwd packages/sdk test && bun run --cwd packages/worker test && bun run --cwd packages/rendering test && bun run --cwd packages/cli test
